节点.功能描述: This module offers set network policies on the devices.
Address family. 1: IPV4, 2: IPV6, default is IPV4.
Address family. 1: IPV4, 2: IPV6, default is IPV4.
Defines the configuration mode of the Ethernet connection.
Network interface configuration for the Ethernet connection.

Gets all the network interfaces of the device. This function can be called by a super administrator. The admin must have the corresponding permission. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
